cluster_summaries.label: Pay & Benefits
cluster_summaries.summary: Employees consistently praise the firm's top-tier compensation, bonuses, and comprehensive health benefits.

cluster_summaries.label: Growth & Recognition
cluster_summaries.summary: The firm is viewed as an elite environment for professional development, offering challenging projects and mentorship.

cluster_summaries.label: Culture & Belonging
cluster_summaries.summary: Staff value the collaborative, mission-driven culture and the opportunity to work with diverse, motivated peers.

cluster_summaries.label: Burnout & Workload
cluster_summaries.summary: The high-paced nature of the work often leads to exhaustion and concerns regarding sustainable work-life balance.

cluster_summaries.label: Work-Life Pressure
cluster_summaries.summary: Some employees report that the firm's culture can be inflexible, creating tension between professional expectations and personal life.
